close_reason: Added npm_deps attribute to typescript_library and typescript_binary rules
description:
Enhance typescript_library and typescript_binary rules to consume npm dependencies from the jsdeps cell.

Current state:
- typescript_library only accepts deps from other typescript_library targets
- jsdeps cell provides npm packages as filegroups

Need:
1. Add node_modules attr to typescript_library/binary for jsdeps reference
2. Generate node_modules directory structure from jsdeps packages
3. Configure tsc to resolve modules from that directory
4. Handle transitive npm dependencies

Example usage:
```starlark
typescript_library(
    name = "mylib",
    srcs = ["index.ts"],
    node_modules = "//jsdeps:node_modules",  # or individual packages
)
```

This is required for typescript-hello-deps example.
title: TypeScript rules: support npm deps from jsdeps cell
